ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the stock data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "dividends" INTEGER /* Dividends distributed (if any) */,
  "stock_splits" INTEGER /* Stock splits (if any) */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "open_price_adj" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "high_price_adj" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "low_price_adj" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "close_price_adj" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions for the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator or financial news */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was reported or the news was released */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator or a summary of the news */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator or news content */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., news, economic indicators) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the data source */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, file import) */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualization_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data-visualization link */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data record */,
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualization_links_viz_id FOREIGN KEY ("viz_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualization_links_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("record_id")
)
